mission: Migrate native JS Map/Set/String/Object/Date/JSON/Array usage in first-party packages/** and apps/** to Effect-native equivalents, preferring @beep/utils wrappers where importable.

scope.testsFixtures: in scope only for JSON and String bans

fanout.model: one agent per package per phase, all categories

phase3.gate: typecheck + lint + effect-first checks scoped to package

decisionRules.mapSet: immutable HashMap/HashSet by default; Mutable* only justified local; Record for string keys
decisionRules.date: DateTime for instants, Duration for spans; ban new Date()/Date.now() in domain
decisionRules.json: S.fromJsonString(schema)+decodeUnknownEffect where schema exists; else S.UnknownFromJsonString + flag
decisionRules.importPrecedence: prefer @beep/utils/* (Str/Struct/Array/DateTime) when canImportUtils, else raw effect/*; no-wrapper categories always raw

nextAction: Run Phase 1: spawn 7 parallel agents to build the symbol inventories.

completionGate.statement: Not achieved until this goal's work ships as a PR driven to mergeable via /yeet (bun run beep yeet: repair -> verify -> publish --pr -> monitor).
